Data sharing — NO new pipeline/DB
Snowflake Data Share / Delta Sharing

Compliance-eligible tier
Supabase Team + BAA OR Neon Scale
(Fabric if M365)

span.p:
Microsoft Fabric F2 reserved (~$156/mo)
Lakehouse + Power BI in one bill

Supabase Pro (~$25/mo)
Postgres + RLS + auth + storage
